title: Bidyapati
writer: Debaki Kumar Bose, Kazi Nazrul Islam
plot: Classic celebration of Mithila's King Shiva Singha's (Bannerjee/Kapoor) love for his wife while chronicling the influence of the pacifist court poet Bidyapati (Sanyal). Invited to the royal court by the king, Bidyapati arrives wit...
